title: EX17 1BP, Mr William Ayre, Ms Fiona Ayre and Mr Jeremy Ayre (JD Ayre and Partners): environmental permit issued – EPR/BP3821SD/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Mr William Ayre, Ms Fiona Ayre and Mr Jeremy Ayre (JD Ayre and Partners) Installation name: Long Meadow Permit number: EPR/BP3821SD/A001  "
